title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally with a built-in model library and OpenAI-compatible API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library that wraps the Ollama HTTP API, letting you chat, embed, pull or create models in a few lines.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node, Deno and browsers, providing the same chat/generate/embed calls as the Python lib.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that adds Ollama models as LLM and embeddings components with standard LangChain callbacks.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-styled web UI that connects to a local Ollama instance, offering model switching, code highlighting and multimodal uploads.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial interactive CLI chat client written in Go with conversation history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like server that uses Ollama models for in-editor code completion and chat.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example showing how to combine Ollama embeddings and LLM with a vector DB for question answering over documents.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets users chat with any Ollama model through slash commands or direct messages.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot that forwards channel messages to a local Ollama instance and streams the response back as a thread.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU node selection and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-nvidia
summary: Official CUDA-enabled container image published to GitHub Container Registry for GPU-accelerated inference.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container and exposes it to your CI pipeline for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for building end-to-end NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-llama-index
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embedding drivers for Ollama, enabling local document QA and agent workflows.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate that wraps the Ollama REST API with async/await and strongly typed request/response structs.

title: ollama-dotnet
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with chat, generate and embed endpoints plus IHostedService integration for ASP.NET Core.

title: Modelfile-hub
summary: Community-curated collection of Modelfiles for fine-tuned, uncensored or domain-specific models ready to pull into Ollama.

title: ollama-model-registry
summary: Simple web UI to browse, search and download models from the official Ollama library without using the CLI.

title: ollama-reddit
summary: Active subreddit for discussing new models, troubleshooting, sharing Modelfiles and showcasing integrations.
